sub_goals.description: Implement state-model with all 8 mutations + getState/setState/subscribe; pure JS, no DOM.
sub_goals.verification_notes: All 8 mutations exported (S1.A1). getState shape matches contract (S1.A2). subscribe wired (S1.A3). Empty/whitespace titles rejected; missing ids rejected (S1.A4). Source contains no document/window references (S1.A5). moveCard/reorderCard implemented (S1.A6, S1.A7). genId uses timestamp+counter+random for uniqueness (S1.A8).
